title: cnicus undulatus var. grahamii
intro: Cnicus undulatus var. grahamii, also known as Graham's knapweed or globe knapweed, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Cnicus undulatus var. grahamii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for consumption, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
